title: Denial of Service through coldToFrozen.sh Script in Splunk Enterprise
description: Denial of Service through coldToFrozen.sh Script in Splunk Enterprise
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.2.2, 10.0.5, 9.4.11, 9.3.12, or higher.
Splunk is actively monitoring and patching Splunk Cloud Platform instances.
